# HL6 v2.0.1

## 中文

### 认证体验修复

- 重置密码 / 账户激活页面进入时即校验令牌有效性，过期或已使用的链接不再渲染表单，直接提示「该重置链接已失效」
- 无 `token` 参数访问 `/reset-password` 时不再展示表单，提示「未提供重置凭证」
- 新增 `GET /api/v1/auth/password/verify-token` 接口，仅查询不消费令牌，用于前端预校验
- 后端 `appAuthenticationLink` 与客户端 deep link scheme 统一为 `linyu://`

### Android 客户端兼容性修复

- deep link scheme 由 `hl6://` 统一改为 `linyu://`
- 同步更新 `AndroidManifest.xml` intent-filter、`native-client.ts` 解析逻辑、`App.tsx` 路由注释

### 账户删除（新增）

- 管理员可在 `/admin/users` 操作列点击红色「删除账号」按钮删除用户，需精确键入目标用户邮箱确认
- 后端级联清理 DNS 记录、子域名、积分余额与交易、每日签到、会话、凭证、推荐关系、申诉、通知已读回执、密码重置/激活令牌、支付订单
- Cloudflare DNS 批量删除支持异步任务（HTTP 409 + `bulk_job_id`），前端按幂等键重试
- 最后管理员保护：禁止删除系统内最后一个活跃管理员
- 禁止管理员删除自己

### 系统日志接管（新增）

- 所有后端日志（`log.Printf`/`log.Println`）和 Gin access log 异步入库到 `system_logs` 表，同时保留 stderr 输出（容器日志兼容）
- `/admin/logs` 页面可查询、过滤（按级别/模块/时间/关键词）、导出（JSON/TXT）全量后端日志
- 日志按 `[module]` 前缀和状态码/延迟自动分级（DEBUG/INFO/WARN/ERROR）
- 敏感信息入库前自动脱敏：邮箱、JWT、Bearer token、32+ 字符 hex token、`password=xxx`/`secret=xxx` 等键值对
- IP 地址存 `ip_hash`（FNV-1a 64 位哈希），不存原始 IP
- 后台 goroutine 每天清理 30 天前的日志，单批最多 10000 条避免长事务

### 国际化

- 新增 token 验证相关 4 个 i18n key（`tokenVerifying`/`resetLinkInvalid`/`resetLinkInvalidHint`/`resetLinkMissing`），覆盖 6 种语言
- 新增账户删除相关 5 个 i18n key（`deleteAccount`/`deleteAccountConfirmTitle`/`deleteAccountConfirmDesc`/`deleteAccountConfirmLabel`/`deleteAccountSuccess`），覆盖 6 种语言
- 补齐后端已有但前端未翻译的 3 个错误码（`cannotDeleteSelf`/`cannotDeleteLastAdmin`/`failedToDeleteUser`），覆盖 6 种语言

### Bug 修复

- 修复删除用户时 `Notification` 表 `user_id` 列不存在的 SQL 错误（Notification 是按 `target_ids` JSONB 数组分发的广播表，无 `user_id` 列）
- 修复删除用户 mutation 的 3 秒前端 timeout 导致幂等重试触发后端 409「operation in progress」语义混乱
- 修复 `VerifyAuthToken` handler 误用 `response.Ok` 导致编译失败（应为 `response.OK`）
- 修复新建 `DBWriter`/`Config` 与现有 `logger` 包类型冲突导致编译失败（重命名为 `DBSink`/`SinkConfig`）

### 日志详情页移动端适配

- 日志列表表格增加横向滚动容器，Message 列宽度改为响应式（`max-w-[120px] sm:max-w-xs md:max-w-md`）
- Time 列在窄屏（`< md`）隐藏，减少横向占用
- 详情 Dialog 宽度类对齐项目约定（`sm:max-w-2xl` + `max-h-[85vh]`），标题支持 `flex-wrap`
- Dialog 内 `<pre>` 增加 `whitespace-pre-wrap break-words`，长 JSON 字符串自动换行

## English

### Authentication Experience Fixes

- Reset password / account activation pages now validate the token on entry; expired or used links no longer render the form and directly show "this reset link is invalid"
- Visiting `/reset-password` without a `token` parameter no longer shows the form and prompts "no reset credentials provided"
- Added `GET /api/v1/auth/password/verify-token` endpoint that only checks (does not consume) the token, for client-side pre-validation
- Backend `appAuthenticationLink` and client deep link scheme unified to `linyu://`

### Android Client Compatibility Fix

- Unified deep link scheme from `hl6://` to `linyu://`
- Synced updates to `AndroidManifest.xml` intent-filter, `native-client.ts` parsing logic, and `App.tsx` routing comments

### Account Deletion (New)

- Admins can delete a user via the red "Delete Account" button in the `/admin/users` action column; requires typing the target user's email exactly to confirm
- Backend cascades cleanup of DNS records, subdomains, credit balance and transactions, daily check-in, sessions, credentials, referrals, appeals, notification read receipts, password reset/activation tokens, and payment orders
- Cloudflare DNS batch deletion supports async jobs (HTTP 409 + `bulk_job_id`); frontend retries with idempotency key
- Last admin protection: deleting the last active admin is forbidden
- Self-deletion by admins is forbidden

### System Logs Ingestion (New)

- All backend logs (`log.Printf`/`log.Println`) and Gin access logs are asynchronously ingested into the `system_logs` table while still being written to stderr (container log compatible)
- The `/admin/logs` page can query, filter (by level/module/time/keyword), and export (JSON/TXT) the full backend log stream
- Logs are auto-leveled (DEBUG/INFO/WARN/ERROR) based on `[module]` prefix and status code / latency
- Sensitive data is auto-masked before insertion: emails, JWTs, Bearer tokens, 32+ char hex tokens, and `password=xxx`/`secret=xxx` key-value pairs
- IP addresses are stored as `ip_hash` (FNV-1a 64-bit hash); raw IPs are not persisted
- A background goroutine cleans logs older than 30 days daily, in batches of up to 10000 rows to avoid long transactions

### Internationalization

- Added 4 token-validation i18n keys (`tokenVerifying`/`resetLinkInvalid`/`resetLinkInvalidHint`/`resetLinkMissing`) across 6 languages
- Added 5 account-deletion i18n keys (`deleteAccount`/`deleteAccountConfirmTitle`/`deleteAccountConfirmDesc`/`deleteAccountConfirmLabel`/`deleteAccountSuccess`) across 6 languages
- Backfilled 3 backend error codes that were missing frontend translations (`cannotDeleteSelf`/`cannotDeleteLastAdmin`/`failedToDeleteUser`) across 6 languages

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed SQL error "column user_id does not exist" when deleting a user (the `Notification` table is a broadcast table keyed by `target_ids` JSONB array and has no `user_id` column)
- Fixed the 3-second frontend timeout on the delete-user mutation that caused idempotent retries to trigger a semantically confusing backend 409 "operation in progress"
- Fixed `VerifyAuthToken` handler using `response.Ok` (should be `response.OK`) which broke compilation
- Fixed new `DBWriter`/`Config` types conflicting with the existing `logger` package (renamed to `DBSink`/`SinkConfig`)

### Log Detail Page Mobile Adaptation

- Added horizontal scroll container to the log list table; Message column width is now responsive (`max-w-[120px] sm:max-w-xs md:max-w-md`)
- Time column is hidden on narrow screens (`< md`) to reduce horizontal footprint
- Detail Dialog width class aligns with project convention (`sm:max-w-2xl` + `max-h-[85vh]`); title supports `flex-wrap`
- Dialog `<pre>` now has `whitespace-pre-wrap break-words` so long JSON strings wrap automatically
